title: dortmanna minutiflora
intro: Dortmanna minutiflora, also known as the small-leaved dortmanna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Droseraceae. It is a carnivorous plant that obtains essential nutrients by capturing and digesting small insects. The medicinal properties of Dortmanna minutiflora include its potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant are still being researched, but it is believed to offer antioxidant and immune-boosting properties, and can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions.
